creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 245189
Patch to update net/remmina to 1.4.32

Hi Yuri,

This is a patch to update net/remmina to 1.4.32. It works for me although I can't test all the options. The About window correctly reports the version number. I needed to cherry pick a commit since Remmina failed to build if the SSH plugin was disabled.

Would you have a look?
